calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Inventory and Appraisal, a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of A Status Report have not been filed. Pursuant to the Court Order dated Novmeber 17, 2012, administration of the Estate is terminated on the Court's own motion.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was continued to January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send an order to Attorney Thomas Roland regarding termination of the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Nov-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Roland for Rena Lewis.

Mr. Roland stated that he has been unable to reach Ms. Lewis, that he was not aware of any other assets of the Estate and that he did not think Ms. Lewis would file anything to close the Estate. Status of close of the Estate was continued to November 9, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of First And Final Account By Sharlisa Byrd
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The Court stated that the Petition for Entitlement was still pending and that it intended to rule on it, and that it would sign the order for probate as indicated at the last hearing. Therefore, today's matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Roland for and with Rena Lewis. Sharlisa Byrd appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Rolland, Rena and Sharlisa spoke of the various marriages/relationships Mr. Evans had with a total of four Women including Rena and Sharlisa. Mr. Roland conceded that Imanie Mea-Marie Evans was Mr. Evans' child stating that Mr. Evans' name was on the birth certificate and that Mr. Evans always claimed her as his child. Mr. Roland also stated that he was informed that all of the money was sent to Sharlisa and that if his Client was appointed that he would pursue legal action against Attorney Hollund. In addition, Mr. Roland objected to the Court's consideration of a continuance or hearing any argument from anyone other than the Petitioner stating that no objection had been filed in response to the petition. Ms. Byrd stated that there were no assets in the Estate, that she had destroyed all of the money ($98,000.00), that she had no funds to pay for an Attorney and that she had no objection to Ms. Lewis being appointed. The Court directed Ms. Byrd to file a declaration with regard to an accounting with regard to any assets in the Estate. The Petition for Order Determining Persons Entitled to Distribution was taken under submission. The Petition for Probate filed by Rena Lewis was granted (subject to a written order). The First and Final Account by Sharlisa Byrd was continued to April 27, 2010 at 10:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of First And Final Account By Sharlisa Byrd
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Continued To Apr-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Filed By Rena Lewis
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

There being no appearance, the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Persons Entitled To Distribution Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Roland for and with Rena Lewis. George Holland for and with Sharlisa Byrd. Stephanie Michaels (Family Member) in Propria Persona.

The Court suggested the Parties discuss the matter outside of the courtroom. Upon returning, Mr. Roland stated that they did not reach an agreement. Ms. Michaels stated that Ms. Byrd no longer wanted to be represented by Mr. Holland. Mr. Roland objected to Ms. Michaels being part of the proceedings and questioned her legal capacity. The matter was continued to March 19, 2010 at 10:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Sharlisa Byrd is ordered to appear on that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of First And Final Account By Sharlisa Byrd
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate Filed By Rena Lewis
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: George Holland, Esq. Law Offices of George Holland Motion to be Relieved as counsel for PETITIONER SHARLISA BYRD. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, per moving party. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Continued To Jan-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Roland for Rena Lewis. George Holland for Sharlisa Byrd. Stephanie Michaels (Aunt of Sharlisa Byrd) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Holland stated that Ms. Byrd took money out of the two bank accounts, that she cashed the check from Tim Brandie's office in the amount of $98,000.00 and that title on all five vehicles had been changed. Mr. Roland stated that it appeared the estate still had $150,000.00, that his petition for probate filed in November had been dismissed without prejudice, presented an order vacating the Dismissal and stated that his Client was unable to afford the filing fees. The Court ordered the removal of Sharlisa Byrd as Administrator of the Estate. Ms. Byrd is to file a First and Final Account by January 27, 2010. Mr. Rolland's petition for probate was also re-scheduled for January 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

The matter was re-called at 10:27 a.m. Ms. Michaels stated that she was responsible for the relationship between Ms. Byrd and Mr. Holland, that she felt Ms. Byrd was not properly represented by Mr. Holland and that she was going to investigate the possibility of monies being in Mississippi with the Decedent's Aunt.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Continued To Jan-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Holland for Sharlisa Byrd. Rena Lewis in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Holland that the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel needed to be set in the Probate department not the Law and Motion department. Mr. Holland stated that Ms. Byrd had been informed that a bond, the Inventory and Appraisal and the Report needed to be filed. In addition, he stated that there was no cooperation from Ms. Byrd and confirmed that her current address was 1529 Colt Way, San Jose, CA 95121. Ms. Lewis stated that her lawyer was not able to attend today's hearing and that they were going to file a petition to remove Ms. Byrd. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Sharlisa Byrd to appear and show cause as to why she should not be removed as the Administrator of the Estate of Emmanuel Evans. The return date is January 6, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court suspended Sharlisa Byrd's powers as Administrator of the Estate of Emmanuel Evans.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Holland for Sharlisa Byrd. Thomas Roland for and with Rena Lewis. Ernestine Evans (Sister of the Decedent) in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the bond issue, the amount of assets, protection of the assets, suspension of powers, the number of times the Decedent was married, the number of children the Decedent had, proper format of the objection and standing. The Court informed Mr. Roland that Ms. Lewis needed to file a Petition for Removal of the Administrator and Appointment of a Successor Administrator. The Court informed Mr. Holland that a bond in the amount of $155,000.00 was required, that a Minor could not waive bond and that the Inventory and Appraisal also needed to be filed. The petition for Letters of Administration filed by Ms. Lewis was denied without prejudice subject to the petition for removal of the current Administrator. Status on filing of the bond was set for December 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
